revision.comment: Created page with "{{tmbox |name=wikidata-link |type=notice |image=[[File:Wikidata-logo.svg|50px]] |text=This {{pagetype}} is linked to a corresponding entry on [[Wikidata]]: [[d:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]. |small=no |smallimage=[[File:Wikidata-logo.svg|30px]] |smalltext=[[d:{{{1}}}|View the corresponding Wikidata item]] }}<includeonly> [[Category:Pages with Wikidata links]] </includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>"
revision.text: {{tmbox |name=wikidata-link |type=notice |image=[[File:Wikidata-logo.svg|50px]] |text=This {{pagetype}} is linked to a corresponding entry on [[Wikidata]]: [[d:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]. |small=no |smallimage=[[File:Wikidata-logo.svg|30px]] |smalltext=[[d:{{{1}}}|View the corresponding Wikidata item]] }}<includeonly> [[Category:Pages with Wikidata links]] </includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

[[File:Wikidata-logo.svg|20px|link=d:{{{1}}}]]  This page is linked to its entry on [[Wikidata]]: [[d:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]].
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Undo revision [[Special:Diff/4680066|4680066]] by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]])
